title: Time Runs Out for Dressrosa
description: Pages 16–19 focus on time runs out for dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as even as executives fall, the Birdcage keeps shrinking and turns the whole country into a race against time.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: USOPP and the King will both be crushed instantly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What can I do....!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Pica!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Don't tell me... He's coming this way?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Plan A: Fire off a slash.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: No... He's too far. It won't have enough power to finish him off.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Plan B: Try to jump up to where they are.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No... there's no way I'll make it! Plus, if I fall, that'll be the end of me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Plan C: Scream out as loud as I can to warn usopp and the others of the danger...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Crap, there's no way they'd hear me at this distance.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Plan D: Contact them on the Den Den Mushi...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: And tell them to get the hell out of there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Only problem there is that I don't have a den den den den den den den men mushi.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Plan E:

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: AAA! AAM!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: CH. 777 / end

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Leap into the sky and cut this fucker in half!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Save us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Plan 'E' It is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Does this man have some- thing up his sleeve!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: f you ever think of me in the future

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: I want you to remember me smiling

summary: Time Runs Out for Dressrosa advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
